pr.title: Non-record: 11L Depth Recurrence + High-Yield Legal TTT (1.14458 BPB)

output.summary: Depth-recurrent 11-layer GPT uses partial RoPE, deep value embeddings, and SGD+momentum legal TTT with frozen early blocks for stronger adaptation gains.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training occurs via competition-legal test-time training on each validation chunk, so all updates happen on validation data after scoring.
techniques: SGD+momentum legal TTT per 32K chunk with frozen early blocks for stronger adaptation
Depth recurrence with scaled LayerNorm, partial RoPE, and deep-layer value embeddings to boost capacity
